history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, medium shot of a young person with dark reddish-brown hair styled in pigtails, adorned with colorful hair clips and small glittery heart and star stickers on their face. They are wearing a red and white checkered collared shirt, also decorated with scattered heart stickers on the chest and neck area. The person has dramatic eye makeup with prominent green eyeshadow and long lashes, and their hands are held up near their face with long, decorated fingernails. The lighting is soft and diffused, creating a slightly dreamy and playful atmosphere. The color palette is dominated by reds, pinks, and pastel shades from the stickers and accessories, contrasted with the darker hair and eyes. The overall mood is whimsical, cute, and reminiscent of kawaii or anime aesthetics. The background is dark and out of focus, keeping the attention solely on the subject.
